chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 59 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.01.2018 For orders as to non-prosecution Mr. Karim Bux Rind, advocate for applicant Learned counsel for petitioners submits that he will be satisfied if the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law, shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and shall provide them protection as provided to other citizens of this country. Order accordingly. This petition stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
